chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 224 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 04.08.2025 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- No one is present for the applicant; so was the case on the earlier dates when progress report was called, which is still not available. However, going through the record, it was observed that on 30.05.2025, it had already been noted that the applicant had acquired bail; however, it was also stated that the same was on account of concealment of bail application pending before this Court. Although the matter to be considered for proper action is present, considering that the basic purpose of the bail application has become infructuous, it is preferred that the time of this Court is being utilized for an objective purpose. As such, this bail application stands disposed of having become infructuous. J U D G E Abdul Basit
